svg.style: font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif; font-size: 1rem;

text.style: cursor: pointer; font-size: 1em; text-decoration: none; font-weight: normal; fill: rgb(51, 51, 51);
cursor: pointer; font-size: 1em; text-decoration: line-through; font-weight: normal; fill: rgb(102, 102, 102);
